prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Once upon a time, deep in the ocean, there lived an octopus named Oliver. Oliver was a shy and timid creature, always afraid to show himself to anyone. He spent his days alone, hiding in his den and dreaming of making friends. One day, Oliver realized that if he ever wanted to know the joys of friendship, he would have to face his fears and emerge from his safe, familiar lair.
